subject: r: michael slade/lon/ect is out of the office.

emails.subject: R: Michael Slade/LON/ECT is out of the office.
emails.subject_base: R: Michael Slade/LON/ECT is out of the office.
emails.body: Hello Jeff I'm not chasing at all, but wondered when the Unanimous Consent might have been finalised as you can see it won't delay the recapitalization process but will be needed in due course for registration. I promised I would let local counsel know a likely timeframe. Many thanks for your help. Michael Forwarded by Michael Slade/LON/ECT on 12/12/2000 15:51 "Venturini, Piero" <PVenturini@gop.it> on 12/12/2000 15:37:50
